text:
Makefile changed:

Added

- MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.tuxpaint.org/unix/x/defendguin/src/ \
- COMMENT=	Your mission is to defend little penguinoids
- LICENSE=	GPLv2
- PORTDATA=	*
- PORTDOCS=
- Pixmaps
- OptionsNG

- Take maintainership

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)
